title: Retrieve item files uploaded through the item file gallery using API

posts.author: juangrases (Juan Grases)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I noticed that when getting the assets (files) of an item through the graphQL API, we only get the files uploaded through the column but not the ones uploaded on the item file gallery.
Is there a way to retrieve this files using the API?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @juangrases and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I have checked with our R&D team and as of today there is no way of retrieving such files via API.

Let me know if you have any other questions

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
